Up Only Fund — machine-readable summary
========================================

Name: Up Only Fund
Focus: RISE ecosystem allocator narrative, $UPONLY liquid tranche transparency, and a live RISE market terminal.

What this site is
-----------------
Up Only Fund is presented as its own program brand: published mandate, treasury intent, and desk tooling for RISE markets. It is not financial advice or a guarantee of returns.

Where to follow
---------------
- X: https://x.com/uponly_fund
- Telegram: https://t.me/uponly_fund

App routes (typical)
--------------------
- / — RISE markets overview
- /terminal — terminal layout
- /landing — marketing / mandate page

Set the public origin for metadata with VITE_PUBLIC_SITE_ORIGIN (see src/config/site.ts).
